title: The Fox and the Grapes
content:
One hot day, a fox was walking through a garden.

He saw some yummy grapes hanging from a vine.

"Those grapes look so good!" said the fox. "I want to eat them."

The fox jumped up to get the grapes. But they were too high!

He jumped again. He still could not reach them.

The fox tried over and over. He jumped and jumped.

But the grapes were just too high.

"Those grapes are probably sour anyway," said the fox.

He walked away with his nose in the air.

It is easy to dislike what you cannot have.

The End.

author: Aesop
